name: analytics
description: Instrument and discover analytics events in Sentry's frontend UI. Use when adding tracking to buttons, pages, modals, or custom interactions, when defining new analytics events, when searching for existing events, when auditing analytics coverage for a feature, or when answering questions about how users interact with a feature. Trigger on "add analytics", "track event", "instrument analytics", "analytics event", "track click", "track page view", "add tracking", "what events exist for", "audit a
author: getsentry
summary_zh: 用于在 Sentry 前端界面中埋点和查找分析事件，适合给按钮、弹窗、页面加追踪，定义新事件，或排查某个功能的埋点覆盖情况。
